headline: Corgi Loaf Baking Co.: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Corgi Loaf Baking Co. is projected #5 of 16 with a 646.40 projected-starting-lineup C-AVI total, led by Justin Jefferson, Kyle Pitts, and Malik Nabers. The immediate priority is improving the FLEX slot without weakening that core.

projected_power.method: Sum of the eight verified projected starters' C-AVI values from all 16 AVI-Core team files

dynasty_power.method: Sum of every verified rostered player's D-AVI value from all 16 AVI-Core team files

latest_trade.summary: On July 8, Corgi Loaf Baking Co. traded with Rapid Valley Annihilation and acquired 2026 Round 1 (Rapid Valley Annihilation) while sending 2027 Round 1 (Corgi Loaf Baking Co.), 2028 Round 1 (Corgi Loaf Baking Co.). The deal sent out 2 draft assets, reducing future flexibility; The deal added 1 draft asset.

gap_closing_moves: Raise the FLEX slot above Jakobi Meyers's 65.6 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 80.6 C-AVI would directly attack the 15.00-point projected gap to SmokyValleyWheatWarriors.
Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

latest_trade.summary: On July 15, Ravens Regime traded with Northside Kings and acquired Tyler Warren while sending RJ Harvey, Bhayshul Tuten, 2026 Round 2 (Rapid Valley Annihilation). Tyler Warren is now the current TE starter at 97.2 C-AVI and 90.5 D-AVI; The deal sent out 1 draft asset, reducing future flexibility.

rival_below.summary: On July 15, Ravens Regime traded with Northside Kings and acquired Tyler Warren while sending RJ Harvey, Bhayshul Tuten, 2026 Round 2 (Rapid Valley Annihilation). Tyler Warren is now the current TE starter at 97.2 C-AVI and 90.5 D-AVI; The deal sent out 1 draft asset, reducing future flexibility.

sections.title: Projected Power Position
sections.body: Projected #5 of 16 at 646.40 lineup C-AVI. SmokyValleyWheatWarriors is immediately above at 661.40, a gap of 15.00. Ravens Regime is immediately behind at 640.30.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Justin Jefferson (97.3), Kyle Pitts (93.9), and Malik Nabers (84.5).

The deal sent out 2 draft assets, reducing future flexibility; The deal added 1 draft asset.

sections.title: Moves to Close the Gap
sections.body: Raise the FLEX slot above Jakobi Meyers's 65.6 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 80.6 C-AVI would directly attack the 15.00-point projected gap to SmokyValleyWheatWarriors. Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.
